# Tests that pass locally but cannot be added to the baseline because of
# environment differences in CI. The refresh-testkit-baseline script
# subtracts these from the generated pass list.
#
# Format: one test id per line (matches the format in
# testkit-baseline.txt). Comments and blank lines ignored.

# Errors in testkit's dns_resolve_single helper because GitHub Actions
# Ubuntu resolves "localhost" to both 127.0.0.1 and ::1; the helper
# requires single-IP. Setup errors before our backend is exercised.
test_address (tests.neo4j.test_summary.TestSummary.test_address)
test_custom_resolver (tests.neo4j.test_direct_driver.TestDirectDriver.test_custom_resolver)
